diagrams.title: Function Prototype Structure

diagrams.title: Program Organization with Function Prototypes
diagrams.description: Typical C program structure showing where function prototypes are placed relative to headers, main, and function definitions
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing proper program organization and the role of prototypes in enabling any order of function definition and calling
